---
title: "Self-restraint as mediator"
output: html_document
date: "2025-10-07"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

#1. Cleaning
```{r}
df <- read.csv("C:/Users/sy3248/Desktop/Self-restraint/lgbtPKU.csv")
dim(df)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
#renaming for categoricals and ordinals
df <- df %>%
  rename(age = Q3,
         nationality = Q4,
         ethnicity = Q5,
         department = Q6,
         grade = Q7,
         previous_residency = Q8,
         sexual_orientation = Q12,
         nonconformity_masculine = Q14,
         nonconformity_feminine = Q15,
         support_from_queer = Q25_行1,
         support_from_nonqueer = Q25_行1,
         )

#manipulations
df$self_restraint_teacher <- 5 - df$Q18
df$documented_male <- 2 - df$Q9
df$documented_female <- 1 - df$documented_male

df$assigned_male <- ifelse(df$Q10 != 3, 2 - df$Q10, NA)
df$assigned_female <- 1 - df$assigned_male

df$cisgender <- 2 - df$Q11
df$transgender <- 1 - df$cisgender

library(fastDummies)
df <- dummy_cols(df, select_columns = "sexual_orientation", remove_first_dummy = TRUE)

df$singleness <- ifelse(df$Q13 == 1, 1, 0)

df$gn <- ifelse(df$nonconformity_masculine == -3, 
             df$nonconformity_feminine, df$nonconformity_masculine)

df$outness <- 2 - df$Q16
df$out_to_teacher <- ifelse(df$Q17 == 1, 1, 0)
df$public_out = ifelse(df$Q21 == 1, 1, 0)
df$out_to_queer_friends = ifelse(df$Q23 == -3, 1, df$Q23)
df$out_to_nonqueer_friends = ifelse(df$Q24 == -3, 1, df$Q24)

#LGBTQ+
df$LGBTQ <- ifelse(df$Q10 != 3 & df$cisgender == 1 & df$sexual_orientation == 2, 0, 1)

#perceived LGBTQ+-affirming attitude
df$perceived_acceptance_teacher = 5 - df$Q19
df$perceived_acceptance_student = 5 - df$Q28

df$victimization_teacher <- 1 - df$Q20_选项17
df$victimization_student <- 1 - df$Q29_选项14
df$victimization_ever <- ifelse(df$victimization_teacher == 1 | df$victimization_student == 1, 1, 0)

#Self-restraint of gender expression
df$self_restraint_allstudent <- 10 - df$Q27_行1 - df$Q27_行2
df$self_restraint_otherLGBTQ <- 5 - df$Q27_行1
df$self_restraint_otherstudents <- 5 - df$Q27_行2
df$self_restraint <- df$self_restraint_teacher + df$self_restraint_allstudent

# self-esteem: Rosenberg Self-Esteem Scale, RSES
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Q31_行3_r  = 6 - Q31_行3,
    Q31_行5_r  = 6 - Q31_行5,
    Q31_行8_r  = 6 - Q31_行8,
    Q31_行9_r  = 6 - Q31_行9,
    Q31_行10_r = 6 - Q31_行10)

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    self_esteem = rowSums(
      select(., all_of(c(
        "Q31_行1", "Q31_行2", "Q31_行3_r", "Q31_行4", "Q31_行5_r",
        "Q31_行6", "Q31_行7", "Q31_行8_r", "Q31_行9_r", "Q31_行10_r"
      ))),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  )

# depression: Center for Epidemiologic Studies Depression Scale, CESD 9-item Chinese version
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Q30_行5_r = 5 - Q30_行5,
    Q30_行7_r = 5 - Q30_行7)

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    depression = Q30_行1 + Q30_行2 + Q30_行3 + Q30_行4 + 
                 Q30_行5_r + Q30_行6 + Q30_行7_r + Q30_行8 + Q30_行9
  )

#anxiety: Generalized Anxiety Disorder Scale, GAD-7
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    anxiety = rowSums(select(., all_of(c("Q32_行1", "Q32_行2", "Q32_行3", "Q32_行4", "Q32_行5", "Q32_行6", "Q32_行7"))),
                      na.rm = TRUE))
```


```{r}
#check inconsistent cases
#transgender
df %>%
  filter((documented_female == 1 & assigned_male == 1 & transgender == 0) | (documented_male == 1 & assigned_female == 1 & transgender == 0))

#outness
df %>%
  filter((outness == 0 & out_to_teacher== 1) | (outness == 0 & public_out == 1))


#outness in nonLGBTQ
#SOGIE-based victimization among non-LGBTQ+
df %>%
  filter(LGBTQ == 0 & outness == 1)

df %>%
  filter(LGBTQ == 0 & out_to_teacher == 1)
```

```{r}
#drop one inconsistent case
df1 <- df %>%
  filter(!((documented_female == 1 & assigned_male == 1 & transgender == 0) | (documented_male == 1 & assigned_female == 1 & transgender == 0)) %in% TRUE)
dim(df1)
```
```{r}
#drop two
df1 <- df1 %>%
  filter(!(LGBTQ == 0 & outness == 1))
dim(df1)
```
```{r}
#drop inconsistent case
#constantly filling the same value for multiple question matrices
df1 <- df1 %>%
  filter(!(index == 1273))
dim(df1)
```

#2. Descriptives
##2.1. dem & exp
```{r}
df1 %>%
  select(LGBTQ, documented_female, transgender, sexual_orientation, 
         gn, outness, 
         age, nationality, ethnicity, department, grade, previous_residency, 
         victimization_teacher, victimization_student, victimization_ever ) %>%
  summary
```
```{r}
#value counts
lapply(df1[,c('LGBTQ','sexual_orientation', 'gn', 'outness', 'out_to_queer_friends', 
              'out_to_nonqueer_friends', 'out_to_teacher', 'public_out',
             'nationality', 'age', 'victimization_teacher', 'victimization_student', 'victimization_ever')], table)
```

##2.2. s-restr
```{r}
#self-restraint
table(df1$self_restraint_teacher)
table(df1$self_restraint_otherLGBTQ)
table(df1$self_restraint_otherstudents)

table(df1$self_restraint_allstudent)
table(df1$self_restraint)
summary(df1$self_restraint)
```

```{r}
library(psych)
alpha_sr <- alpha(df1[, c("self_restraint_teacher", "self_restraint_otherLGBTQ", "self_restraint_otherstudents")])
print(alpha_sr)
```



```{r}
#Cronbach's alpha
library(psych)
alpha(df1[c("self_restraint_teacher", "self_restraint_otherLGBTQ", "self_restraint_otherstudents")])
#not valid for this formative construct
```
```{r}
#correlation
cor(df1[,c("self_restraint_teacher",
           "self_restraint_otherLGBTQ",
           "self_restraint_otherstudents")],
    use="pairwise.complete.obs")
```

```{r}
#review of self-restraint sum
sr_varlist <- c("self_restraint_teacher", "self_restraint_otherstudents", "self_restraint_otherLGBTQ", "self_restraint")

#restraint among LGBTQ+
print("Among LGBTQ+")
for (v in sr_varlist) {
  cat(":\n")
  df1 %>%
    filter(LGBTQ == 1) %>%
    count(.data[[v]]) %>%
    mutate(percent = n / sum(n) * 100) %>%
    print()
  cat("\n")
}

#restraint among non-LGBTQ+
print("Among non-LGBTQ+")
for (v in sr_varlist) {
  cat(":\n")
  df1 %>%
    filter(LGBTQ == 0) %>%
    count(.data[[v]]) %>%
    mutate(percent = n / sum(n) * 100) %>%
    print()
  cat("\n")
}
```
#2.3. victm
```{r}
lapply(df1[, paste0('Q20_选项',1:15)], table)
lapply(df1[, paste0('Q29_选项', 1:12)], table)
```

```{r}
#count
df1$victim_teacher_count <- rowSums(df1[, paste0('Q20_选项', 1:15)])
df1$victim_student_count <- rowSums(df1[, paste0('Q29_选项', 1:12)])
df1$victimization_count <- df1$victim_teacher_count + df1$victim_student_count

table(df1$victim_teacher_count)
table(df1$victim_student_count)
table(df1$victimization_count)
```
```{r}
df1 %>% top_n(3, victim_teacher_count)
df1 %>% top_n(3, victim_student_count)
```

```{r}
#SOGIE-based victimization among non-LGBTQ+
df1 %>%
  filter(LGBTQ == 1) %>%
  count(victimization_ever)

df1 %>%
  filter(LGBTQ == 0) %>%
  count(victimization_ever)

df1 %>%
  filter((LGBTQ == 0 & victimization_ever == 1))
```

```{r}
#Kuder-Richardson Formula 20 (KR-20)
kr20_result1 <- psych::alpha((df1[paste0("Q20_选项", 1:15)]), check.keys = TRUE)
print(kr20_result1)

kr20_result2 <- psych::alpha((df1[paste0("Q29_选项", 1:12)]), check.keys = TRUE)
print(kr20_result2)
#not valid for this formative construct
```


```{r}
#Victimization weighted sum score
# microaggression *1; moderate violence & discrimination *2; severe violence *3
df1$victm_teacher_sum <- 
  1 * df1$Q20_选项1 + 1 * df1$Q20_选项3 + 1 * df1$Q20_选项4 +
  2 * df1$Q20_选项2 + 2 * df1$Q20_选项6 + 2 * df1$Q20_选项7 + 2 * df1$Q20_选项8 +
  2 * df1$Q20_选项9 + 2 * df1$Q20_选项10 + 2 * df1$Q20_选项11 + 2 * df1$Q20_选项12 + 2 * df1$Q20_选项15 +
  3 * df1$Q20_选项5 + 3 * df1$Q20_选项13 + 3 * df1$Q20_选项14
  
df1$victm_student_sum <-
  1 * df1$Q29_选项1 + 1 * df1$Q29_选项3 + 1 * df1$Q29_选项4 +
  2 * df1$Q29_选项2 + 2 * df1$Q29_选项6 + 2 * df1$Q29_选项7 + 2 * df1$Q29_选项8 +
  2 * df1$Q29_选项9 + 2 * df1$Q29_选项12 +
  3 * df1$Q29_选项5 + 3 * df1$Q29_选项10 + 3 * df1$Q29_选项11

df1$victimization_sum <- df1$victm_teacher_sum + df1$victm_student_sum

table(df1$victm_teacher_sum)
table(df1$victm_student_sum)
table(df1$victimization_sum)

df1 %>% slice_max(victm_teacher_sum, n = 10)
df1 %>% slice_max(victm_student_sum, n = 10)
df1 %>% slice_max(victimization_sum, n = 10)
```
```{r}
summary(df1$victimization_sum)
```


#2.4. outness
```{r}
#convert 1-5 to 0-1
df1$out_to_teacher_norm <- df1$out_to_teacher
df1$out_to_queer_friends_norm <- (df1$out_to_queer_friends - 1)/4  # 1-5 -> 0-1
df1$out_to_nonqueer_friends_norm <- (df1$out_to_nonqueer_friends - 1)/4  # 1-5 -> 0-1

table(df1$out_to_teacher_norm)
table(df1$out_to_queer_friends_norm)
table(df1$out_to_nonqueer_friends_norm)
print("----------")
print("binary outness:")
table(df1$outness)
print("outness-three score sum:")
df1$outness_sum <- rowSums(df1[,c("out_to_teacher_norm","out_to_queer_friends_norm","out_to_nonqueer_friends_norm")])
table(df1$outness_sum)
summary(df1$outness_sum)
```


#3. Associations
```{r}
keyvariables <- c("depression","anxiety", "LGBTQ", "documented_female", "age", 
                  "victimization_sum", "gn", "outness_sum", "self_esteem", "self_restraint","outness_sum")

corr.test(df1[, keyvariables])
```
```{r}
corr_res <- corr.test(df1[, keyvariables])
corr_matrix <- corr_res$r
p_matrix <- corr_res$p

library(corrplot)

corrplot(corr_matrix, 
         method = "circle", 
         type = "lower",
         p.mat = p_matrix,       # 传入 p 值矩阵
         sig.level = 0.05,       # 显著性阈值
         insig = "pch") 
```

#5. S1 LGBTQ Identity
```{r}
#simple linear regression: Mental health ~ LGBTQ+ identity
s1s1_dep_model <- lm(depression ~ LGBTQ, data = df1)
summary(s1s1_dep_model)

s1s1_anx_model <- lm(anxiety ~ LGBTQ, data = df1)
summary(s1s1_anx_model)
```

#5.1. S1 dep
```{r}
library('lavaan')
# SEM: Identity -> victimization + self-restrain -> depression
s1_dep_model <- '
  # outcome
  depression ~ a*LGBTQ + b*victimization_sum + c*self_restraint + f1*documented_female
  
  # mediation paths
  victimization_sum ~ d*LGBTQ + f2*documented_female
  self_restraint ~ e*LGBTQ + f3*documented_female

  # self-esteem
  self_esteem ~~ victimization_sum
  self_esteem ~~ self_restraint
  self_esteem ~~ depression
  self_esteem ~~ LGBTQ
  gn ~~ self_restraint
  gn ~~ victimization_sum

  # indirect effects
  indirect_victimization := b*d
  indirect_selfrestraint := e*c
  total_indirect := indirect_victimization + indirect_selfrestraint

  # total effect
  total_effect := a + total_indirect
'

s1_dep_fit <- sem(s1_dep_model, data=df1, estimator="ML", se="bootstrap" , bootstrap=1000)
summary(s1_dep_fit, standardized=TRUE, fit.measures=TRUE)
```

```{r}
#additional experiment: moderated-mediation
# SEM: Identity -> victimization + self-restrain -> depression
s1_dep_model <- '
  # outcome
  depression ~ a*LGBTQ + b*victimization_sum + c*self_restraint + f1*documented_female
  
  # mediation paths
  victimization_sum ~ d*LGBTQ + f2*documented_female
  self_restraint ~ e*LGBTQ + f3*documented_female
  
  #moderation
  depression ~~ victimization_sum*self_esteem
  depression ~~ self_restraint*self_esteem

  # self-esteem
  self_esteem ~~ victimization_sum
  self_esteem ~~ self_restraint
  self_esteem ~~ depression
  self_esteem ~~ LGBTQ
  gn ~~ self_restraint
  gn ~~ victimization_sum

  # indirect effects
  indirect_victimization := b*d
  indirect_selfrestraint := e*c
  total_indirect := indirect_victimization + indirect_selfrestraint

  # total effect
  total_effect := a + total_indirect
'

s1_dep_fit <- sem(s1_dep_model, data=df1, estimator="ML", se="bootstrap" , bootstrap=1000)
summary(s1_dep_fit, standardized=TRUE, fit.measures=TRUE)
```



# 5.2. S1 anx
```{r}
# SEM: Identity -> victimization + self-restrain -> anxiety
s1_anx_model <- '
  # outcome
  anxiety ~ a*LGBTQ + b*victimization_sum + c*self_restraint + f1*documented_female
  
  # mediation paths
  victimization_sum ~ d*LGBTQ + f2*documented_female
  self_restraint ~ e*LGBTQ + f3*documented_female
  
  #moderation
  anxiety ~~ victimization_sum*self_esteem
  anxiety ~~ self_restraint*self_esteem

  # self-esteem
  self_esteem ~~ victimization_sum
  self_esteem ~~ self_restraint
  self_esteem ~~ anxiety
  self_esteem ~~ LGBTQ
  gn ~~ self_restraint
  gn ~~ victimization_sum

  # indirect effects
  indirect_victimization := b*d
  indirect_selfrestraint := e*c
  total_indirect := indirect_victimization + indirect_selfrestraint

  # total effect
  total_effect := a + total_indirect
'

s1_anx_fit <- sem(s1_anx_model, data=df1, estimator="ML", se="bootstrap" , bootstrap=1000)
summary(s1_anx_fit, standardized=TRUE, fit.measures=TRUE)

```

#6. S2 GN
```{r}
#simple linear regression: Mental health ~ Gender nonconformity
s2s1_dep_model <- lm(depression ~ gn, data = df1)
summary(s2s1_dep_model)

s2s1_anx_model <- lm(anxiety ~ gn, data = df1)
summary(s2s1_anx_model)
```

#6.1. S2 dep

```{r}
# SEM: Gender nonconformity -> victimization + self-restrain -> depression
s2_dep_model <- '
  # outcome
  depression ~ a*gn + b*victimization_sum + c*self_restraint + f1*documented_female
  
  # mediation paths
  victimization_sum ~ d*gn + f2*documented_female
  self_restraint ~ e*gn + f3*documented_female

  # accounting for:
  self_esteem ~~ victimization_sum
  self_esteem ~~ self_restraint
  self_esteem ~~ depression
  self_esteem ~~ gn
  self_esteem ~~ LGBTQ
  self_esteem ~~ outness_sum
  outness_sum ~~ depression
  outness_sum ~~ self_restraint
  outness_sum ~~ victimization_sum
  outness_sum ~~ gn
  outness_sum ~ LGBTQ
  LGBTQ ~~ self_restraint
  LGBTQ ~~ victimization_sum
  LGBTQ ~~ gn
  LGBTQ ~~ depression
  
  # indirect effects
  indirect_victimization := b*d
  indirect_selfrestraint := e*c
  total_indirect := indirect_victimization + indirect_selfrestraint

  # total effect
  total_effect := a + total_indirect
'

s2_dep_fit <- sem(s2_dep_model, data=df1, estimator="ML", se="bootstrap" , bootstrap=1000)
summary(s2_dep_fit, standardized=TRUE, fit.measures=TRUE)
```


#6.2. S2 anx
```{r}
# SEM: Gender nonconformity -> victimization + self-restrain -> anxiety
s2_anx_model <- '
  # outcome
  anxiety ~ a*gn + b*victimization_sum + c*self_restraint + f1*documented_female
  
  # mediation paths
  victimization_sum ~ d*gn + f2*documented_female
  self_restraint ~ e*gn + f3*documented_female

  # accounting for:
  self_esteem ~~ victimization_sum
  self_esteem ~~ self_restraint
  self_esteem ~~ anxiety
  self_esteem ~~ gn
  self_esteem ~~ LGBTQ
  self_esteem ~~ outness
  outness ~~ anxiety
  outness ~~ self_restraint
  outness ~~ victimization_sum
  outness ~~ gn
  outness ~ LGBTQ
  LGBTQ ~~ self_restraint
  LGBTQ ~~ victimization_sum
  LGBTQ ~~ gn
  LGBTQ ~~ anxiety

  # indirect effects
  indirect_victimization := b*d
  indirect_selfrestraint := e*c
  total_indirect := indirect_victimization + indirect_selfrestraint

  # total effect
  total_effect := a + total_indirect
'

s2_anx_fit <- sem(s2_anx_model, data=df1, estimator="ML", se="bootstrap" , bootstrap=1000)
summary(s2_anx_fit, standardized=TRUE, fit.measures=TRUE)
```
#7. robustness
```{r}
#interaction terms
df1$interaction_se_gn <- df1$gn * df1$self_esteem
df1$interaction_se_sr <- df1$self_esteem * df1$self_restraint
df1$interaction_se_victimization <- df1$self_esteem * df1$victimization_sum
```

#7.1 Rob dep
```{r}
#dep
s3_dep_model <- '
  # outcome
  depression ~ a*gn + b*victimization_sum + c*self_restraint + f1*documented_female + e1*interaction_se_sr + e2*interaction_se_victimization + self_esteem
  
  # moderated mediation paths
  victimization_sum ~ d*gn + f2*documented_female + e3*interaction_se_gn + self_esteem
  self_restraint ~ e*gn + f3*documented_female  + e4*interaction_se_gn + self_esteem

  # accounting for:
  self_esteem ~~ LGBTQ
  self_esteem ~~ outness
  outness ~~ depression
  outness ~~ self_restraint
  outness ~~ victimization_sum
  outness ~~ gn
  outness ~ LGBTQ
  LGBTQ ~~ self_restraint
  LGBTQ ~~ victimization_sum
  LGBTQ ~~ gn
  LGBTQ ~~ depression
  
  # indirect effects
  indirect_vic_low := (d + e3*(-1)) * (b + e2*(-1))
  indirect_vic_mean := (d + e3*(0)) * (b + e2*(0))
  indirect_vic_high := (d + e3*(1)) * (b + e2*(1))
  
  indirect_sr_low := (e + e4*(-1)) * (c + e1*(-1))
  indirect_sr_mean := (e + e4*(0)) * (c + e1*(0))
  indirect_sr_high := (e + e4*(1)) * (c + e1*(1))
'

s3_dep_fit <- sem(s3_dep_model, data=df1, estimator="ML", se="bootstrap" , bootstrap=1000)
summary(s3_dep_fit, standardized=TRUE, fit.measures=TRUE)

```

#7.2 Rob anx
```{r}
#anx
s3_anx_model <- '
  # outcome
  anxiety ~ a*gn + b*victimization_sum + c*self_restraint + f1*documented_female + e1*interaction_se_sr + e2*interaction_se_victimization + self_esteem
  
  # moderated mediation paths
  victimization_sum ~ d*gn + f2*documented_female + e3*interaction_se_gn + self_esteem
  self_restraint ~ e*gn + f3*documented_female  + e4*interaction_se_gn + self_esteem

  # accounting for:
  self_esteem ~~ LGBTQ
  self_esteem ~~ outness
  outness ~~ anxiety
  outness ~~ self_restraint
  outness ~~ victimization_sum
  outness ~~ gn
  outness ~ LGBTQ
  LGBTQ ~~ self_restraint
  LGBTQ ~~ victimization_sum
  LGBTQ ~~ gn
  LGBTQ ~~ anxiety
  
  # indirect effects
  indirect_vic_low := (d + e3*(-1)) * (b + e2*(-1))
  indirect_vic_mean := (d + e3*(0)) * (b + e2*(0))
  indirect_vic_high := (d + e3*(1)) * (b + e2*(1))
  
  indirect_sr_low := (e + e4*(-1)) * (c + e1*(-1))
  indirect_sr_mean := (e + e4*(0)) * (c + e1*(0))
  indirect_sr_high := (e + e4*(1)) * (c + e1*(1))
'

s3_anx_fit <- sem(s3_anx_model, data=df1, estimator="ML", se="bootstrap" , bootstrap=1000)
summary(s3_anx_fit, standardized=TRUE, fit.measures=TRUE)

```

#8. sensitivity
#8.1. victim count
```{r}
#substitution: victimization_count
s4_dep_model <- '
  # outcome
  depression ~ a*gn + b*victimization_count + c*self_restraint + f1*documented_female
  
  # mediation paths
  victimization_count ~ d*gn + f2*documented_female
  self_restraint ~ e*gn + f3*documented_female

  # accounting for:
  self_esteem ~~ victimization_count
  self_esteem ~~ self_restraint
  self_esteem ~~ depression
  self_esteem ~~ gn
  self_esteem ~~ LGBTQ
  self_esteem ~~ outness
  outness ~~ depression
  outness ~~ self_restraint
  outness ~~ victimization_count
  outness ~~ gn
  outness ~ LGBTQ
  LGBTQ ~~ self_restraint
  LGBTQ ~~ victimization_count
  LGBTQ ~~ gn
  LGBTQ ~~ depression
  
  # indirect effects
  indirect_victimization := b*d
  indirect_selfrestraint := e*c
  total_indirect := indirect_victimization + indirect_selfrestraint

  # total effect
  total_effect := a + total_indirect
'

s4_dep_fit <- sem(s4_dep_model, data=df1, estimator="ML", se="bootstrap" , bootstrap=1000)
summary(s4_dep_fit, standardized=TRUE, fit.measures=TRUE)
```
```{r}
s4_anx_model <- '
  # outcome
  anxiety ~ a*gn + b*victimization_count + c*self_restraint + f1*documented_female
  
  # mediation paths
  victimization_count ~ d*gn + f2*documented_female
  self_restraint ~ e*gn + f3*documented_female

  # accounting for:
  self_esteem ~~ victimization_count
  self_esteem ~~ self_restraint
  self_esteem ~~ anxiety
  self_esteem ~~ gn
  self_esteem ~~ LGBTQ
  self_esteem ~~ outness
  outness ~~ anxiety
  outness ~~ self_restraint
  outness ~~ victimization_count
  outness ~~ gn
  outness ~ LGBTQ
  LGBTQ ~~ self_restraint
  LGBTQ ~~ victimization_count
  LGBTQ ~~ gn
  LGBTQ ~~ anxiety

  # indirect effects
  indirect_victimization := b*d
  indirect_selfrestraint := e*c
  total_indirect := indirect_victimization + indirect_selfrestraint

  # total effect
  total_effect := a + total_indirect
'

s4_anx_fit <- sem(s4_anx_model, data=df1, estimator="ML", se="bootstrap" , bootstrap=1000)
summary(s4_anx_fit, standardized=TRUE, fit.measures=TRUE)
```

#8.2. victim ever
```{r}
#substitution: victimization_ever
s5_dep_model <- '
  # outcome
  depression ~ a*gn + b*victimization_ever + c*self_restraint + f1*documented_female
  
  # mediation paths
  victimization_ever ~ d*gn + f2*documented_female
  self_restraint ~ e*gn + f3*documented_female

  # accounting for:
  self_esteem ~~ victimization_ever
  self_esteem ~~ self_restraint
  self_esteem ~~ depression
  self_esteem ~~ gn
  self_esteem ~~ LGBTQ
  self_esteem ~~ outness
  outness ~~ depression
  outness ~~ self_restraint
  outness ~~ victimization_ever
  outness ~~ gn
  outness ~ LGBTQ
  LGBTQ ~~ self_restraint
  LGBTQ ~~ victimization_ever
  LGBTQ ~~ gn
  LGBTQ ~~ depression
  
  # indirect effects
  indirect_victimization := b*d
  indirect_selfrestraint := e*c
  total_indirect := indirect_victimization + indirect_selfrestraint

  # total effect
  total_effect := a + total_indirect
'

s5_dep_fit <- sem(s5_dep_model, data=df1, estimator="ML", se="bootstrap" , bootstrap=1000)
summary(s5_dep_fit, standardized=TRUE, fit.measures=TRUE)
```

```{r}
s5_anx_model <- '
  # outcome
  anxiety ~ a*gn + b*victimization_ever + c*self_restraint + f1*documented_female
  
  # mediation paths
  victimization_ever ~ d*gn + f2*documented_female
  self_restraint ~ e*gn + f3*documented_female

  # accounting for:
  self_esteem ~~ victimization_ever
  self_esteem ~~ self_restraint
  self_esteem ~~ anxiety
  self_esteem ~~ gn
  self_esteem ~~ LGBTQ
  self_esteem ~~ outness
  outness ~~ anxiety
  outness ~~ self_restraint
  outness ~~ victimization_ever
  outness ~~ gn
  outness ~ LGBTQ
  LGBTQ ~~ self_restraint
  LGBTQ ~~ victimization_ever
  LGBTQ ~~ gn
  LGBTQ ~~ anxiety

  # indirect effects
  indirect_victimization := b*d
  indirect_selfrestraint := e*c
  total_indirect := indirect_victimization + indirect_selfrestraint

  # total effect
  total_effect := a + total_indirect
'

s5_anx_fit <- sem(s5_anx_model, data=df1, estimator="ML", se="bootstrap" , bootstrap=1000)
summary(s5_anx_fit, standardized=TRUE, fit.measures=TRUE)
```

#8.3. binary outness
```{r}
s6_dep_model <- '
  # outcome
  depression ~ a*gn + b*victimization_sum + c*self_restraint + f1*documented_female
  
  # mediation paths
  victimization_sum ~ d*gn + f2*documented_female
  self_restraint ~ e*gn + f3*documented_female

  # accounting for:
  self_esteem ~~ victimization_sum
  self_esteem ~~ self_restraint
  self_esteem ~~ depression
  self_esteem ~~ gn
  self_esteem ~~ LGBTQ
  self_esteem ~~ outness
  outness ~~ depression
  outness ~~ self_restraint
  outness ~~ victimization_sum
  outness ~~ gn
  outness ~ LGBTQ
  LGBTQ ~~ self_restraint
  LGBTQ ~~ victimization_sum
  LGBTQ ~~ gn
  LGBTQ ~~ depression
  
  # indirect effects
  indirect_victimization := b*d
  indirect_selfrestraint := e*c
  total_indirect := indirect_victimization + indirect_selfrestraint

  # total effect
  total_effect := a + total_indirect
'

s6_dep_fit <- sem(s6_dep_model, data=df1, estimator="ML", se="bootstrap" , bootstrap=1000)
summary(s6_dep_fit, standardized=TRUE, fit.measures=TRUE)
```

```{r}
s6_anx_model <- '
  # outcome
  anxiety ~ a*LGBTQ + b*victimization_sum + c*self_restraint + f1*documented_female
  
  # mediation paths
  victimization_sum ~ d*LGBTQ + f2*documented_female
  self_restraint ~ e*LGBTQ + f3*documented_female
  
  #moderation
  anxiety ~~ victimization_sum*self_esteem
  anxiety ~~ self_restraint*self_esteem

  # self-esteem
  self_esteem ~~ victimization_sum
  self_esteem ~~ self_restraint
  self_esteem ~~ anxiety
  self_esteem ~~ LGBTQ
  gn ~~ self_restraint
  gn ~~ victimization_sum

  # indirect effects
  indirect_victimization := b*d
  indirect_selfrestraint := e*c
  total_indirect := indirect_victimization + indirect_selfrestraint

  # total effect
  total_effect := a + total_indirect
'

s6_anx_fit <- sem(s6_anx_model, data=df1, estimator="ML", se="bootstrap" , bootstrap=1000)
summary(s6_anx_fit, standardized=TRUE, fit.measures=TRUE)
```


## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
